headline: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. Declares Cash Dividend of $0.72 per Common Share for 2Q26
summary: Alexandria Real Estate Equities, Inc. (NYSE: ARE) today announced that its Board of Directors declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.72 per common share for the second quarter of 2026. The dividend is payable on July 15, 2026 to stockholders of record on June 30, 2026.
